name: A racing heart and quiet words | Wilbur
description:
Quackity pov.

•❅───✧❅✦❅✧───❅•

Maybe the stars finally aligned..

•❅────✧❅✦❅✧────❅•

Las nevadas has long since opened, with more buildings, a movie theatre and much,, much more. Now Wilbur and Tommy show up, to talk with quackity. What harm could it cause, just a conversation.

Will you let Wilbur stay, or will you bark at him to leave (Spolier alert, you let him stay). But Will you pry into his subconscious or.. Go back to running the great Las Nevadas, The choice is yours.

Based on a dream I had.

Meant for a slowburn.

1st start message: Male quackity

2nd start message: Female quackity

•❅──────✧❅✦❅✧──────❅•

Requests open
creator: SolarisGold
